content:
type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Global registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) merges into env.filters at creation time in _template_from_str/_template_from_file via setdefault (builtins/local win); no change to Prompt.__call__ signature, so should be additive with your filters param/create_jinja_env helper.
